Records.authors: Solovtsova, O.P., Lashkevich, V.I., Kaptari, L.P.
Records.description: Tenth-order ($\alpha^5$) QED correction to lepton anomalous magnetic moment from vertex diagram with 4 VP bubble insertions on the photon line (1 same-flavor $L$ + 3 different-flavor $\ell$). Exact analytic result via dispersion + Mellin-Barnes as polylogarithms $\operatorname{Li}_n$ ($n \leq 5$) and Lerch transcendent.
Records.familyName: 5-loop QED vertex with 4 VP bubble insertions (lepton g-2)

Names: 5-loop QED vertex with 4 VP bubble insertions (lepton g-2)
CanonicalName: 2-mass c11 core with 4 bubble insertions, 10 massive propagators
